evidence.notes: ProjectDraft focused API tests pass 32/32, focused Workspace tests pass 37/37, and AI/Repository entrypoint revision contract tests pass 2/2. Lint, source typecheck, the initial full build, harness, and diff checks pass. Review follow-up extracted the API save service, blocked legacy IndexedDB auto-save, removed stale Terraform files, preserved conflict status, separated each tab's local recovery key across tabs, refreshes, and duplicated tabs, migrated the legacy shared recovery row, and preserved every dirty local recovery draft behind an accessible local-or-server choice without client/server clock assumptions. Server choice now replaces the mounted Terraform editor without marking the restored server state dirty. A real Chromium three-tab flow passed with first save 200/revision 1, stale save 409 plus conflict dialog, server-latest browser refresh, conflict reload, and stable per-tab recovery keys. The current Webpack build compiles but its generated type check is blocked by pre-existing invalid helper exports in the architecture-draft and architecture-patch-preview Next route files. Full pnpm test was not run outside the sandbox because it includes sandbox E2E and Terraform tests; test:core was stopped after 11 minutes without runner termination and showed only unrelated existing failures in API CORS/error/schema/release-candidate tests.
